BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Quick numbers after Sabor Catering mentioned they might raise rates for 2026. Checking if event minimums still work.

CurrentState.Note: Estimate only. Based on current booking pipeline. Big months are Oct and Nov - Quinceañera season.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Rent increases to $750/mo if property tax passes through
Scenario_A_RentTo750.BreakEvenCalculation: Fixed costs $2,670 + $100 increase = $2,770. At $95/member, $2,770 / $95 = 29.2 → 30 members minimum.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: Minimal. Well within buffer at 55 members.

Scenario_B_RentTo850.Label: Worst case - rent to $850/mo (unlikely per Iverson)
Scenario_B_RentTo850.Impact: Still fine. Iverson said this was unlikely but wanted to stress test.

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: Break-even is roughly 1.5 events per month at current cost structure. Oct-Nov Quinceañera season covers most of the year shortfalls. Main risk is a quiet summer. Honda Odyssey mileage adds up - track it.
ActionItems: Check Sabor Catering contract renewal terms before July
Price full-service packages at $5,500 minimum for 2027 bookings
Log vehicle mileage consistently for tax deductions
